title: Converged-plan convention block (v1.15.0 doctrine, machine-enforced from v1.15.1)
description: Machine contract for the falsification / independent_safeguard / decisive_experiment_before_next_iteration blocks defined in docs/workflows/converged-plan-convention.md. The schema validates STRUCTURE and PRESENCE only. It does NOT and CANNOT assert the hypothesis is true or the safeguard adequate - that remains a human judgement (see validators/validate_converged_plan.py GATE_SCOPE_DISCLAIMER).

convention_schema_version.description: Bumped when the convention shape changes. Plans without this key are legacy/doctrine-only, never silently valid.

hypothesis.description: The converged root cause, one sentence.

falsifiable_from_artifacts.description: true: refutable by reading evidence already in the packet (proof is a test shippable now). false: the DEFINED CLASS - refutable only by an external observation (hardware/firmware state, environment/toolchain, concurrency/timing).

discriminating_experiment.description: The single external test that would refute the hypothesis, concrete enough to run as-is. Required (non-empty) when falsifiable_from_artifacts is false.

refutation_observation.description: The specific pre-specified observable that, if seen, proves the hypothesis WRONG. Must be distinct from `hypothesis`. Required (non-empty) when falsifiable_from_artifacts is false.

empirical_status.description: n/a: falsifiable_from_artifacts true and proving test ships here. pending: defined class, experiment named, not yet run ('fixed/shipped/root-cause-correct' FORBIDDEN). proven: experiment ran, refutation_observation did NOT occur (requires experiment_result). refuted: experiment ran, refutation_observation DID occur - load-bearing terminal state.

reason_na.description: Why empirical_status is n/a (the proving test is included in this iteration).

experiment_result.description: Recorded outcome of the discriminating_experiment. Required for empirical_status proven.

applicable.description: false only when the defect is NOT safety-critical/data-loss/bricking/irreversible-risk. Recording the judgement is mandatory even when false.

works_if_root_cause_wrong.description: MUST be true when applicable: the safeguard protects even if the hypothesis is 100% false.

why.description: Why it still protects even if the hypothesis is wrong (answerable from the mechanism alone); or, when not applicable, why the risk class is not triggered.

ships_with_fix.description: MUST be true when applicable: same change as the hypothesized fix, not later.

decisive_experiment_before_next_iteratio.description: The single test that most cleanly partitions the remaining hypothesis space, to run BEFORE the next iteration. null only when empirical_status is proven or n/a AND the fix is confirmed.

cited_pass_ids.description: Provenance-by-citation: the contributor pass_ids whose content this orchestrator-authored synthesis draws from. Non-empty - the blocks are sealed INTO converged-plan.yaml (same hash), not a loose untracked sidecar, and not a mechanical single-winner extraction.
